name: speculum-sidecar
description: Speculum browser sidecar — Chrome on Xvfb, CDP screencast, navigation guard

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/session-coherence.test.js dist/test/wire-protocol.test.js dist/test/create-handshake.test.js dist/test/diag-probe.test.js dist/test/navigation-guard.test.js dist/test/input-wheel.test.js dist/test/input-touch.test.js dist/test/touch-move-coalescer.test.js dist/test/screencast-idle.test.js dist/test/cookie-sanitize.test.js dist/test/viewport-bounds.test.js dist/test/session-viewport.test.js
